steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The sentence already has a main verb: "offers." The subject is "Such a compensatory measure," so the blank must describe that measure without adding another finite verb before "offers."

steps.title: Choose a modifier
steps.content: Choice B, choice C, and choice D are finite verb forms, so each would create two main verbs joined only by commas. The present participle "counteracting" works as a modifier: the measure counteracting decline offers an evolutionary explanation. The answer is A.
